title: AI Assistant not available for member users after enable the beta feature by admin
excerpt: After enabling the AI Assistant from monday.labs only the admin can see the AI Assistant feature.

posts.author: ori-matityahu-agat (Ori Matityahu)
posts.cookedHtml: After enabling the AI Assistant from monday.labs only the admin can see the AI Assistant feature.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ori,

Once the Admin approves, all team members should receive a pop-up to accept the terms and conditions, as mentioned in this article - Get started: monday AI > Who can use monday AI?.

To confirm, this wasn’t the case on your end once the Admin approve the feature?
